tags.name: Gangs
tags.description: Centers around gang organizations.

tags.name: Dystopian
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a society characterized by poverty, squalor or oppression.

tags.name: Urban
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a city.

tags.name: Crime
tags.description: Centers around unlawful activities punishable by the state or other authority.

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

tags.name: Drugs
tags.description: Prominently features the usage of drugs such as opioids, stimulants, hallucinogens etc.

tags.name: Disability
tags.description: A work that features one or more characters with a physical, mental, cognitive, or developmental condition that impairs, interferes with, or limits the person's ability to engage in certain tasks or actions.

tags.name: Primarily Adult Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of characters above a high school age.

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

tags.name: Guns
tags.description: Prominently features the use of guns in combat.

tags.name: Gore
tags.description: Prominently features graphic bloodshed and violence.

tags.name: Swordplay
tags.description: Prominently features the use of swords in combat.

tags.name: Anti-Hero
tags.description: Features a protagonist who lacks conventional heroic attributes and may be considered a borderline villain.

tags.name: Nudity
tags.description: Features a character wearing no clothing or exposing intimate body parts.

tags.name: Conspiracy
tags.description: Contains one or more factions controlling or attempting to control the world from the shadows.

tags.name: Prostitution
tags.description: Features characters who are paid for sexual favors.

tags.name: Found Family
tags.description: Features a group of characters with no biological relations that are united in a group providing social support.

tags.name: Medicine
tags.description: Centered around the activities of people working in the field of medicine.

tags.name: Age Gap
tags.description: Prominently features romantic relations between people with a significant age difference.

tags.name: Twins
tags.description: Prominently features two or more siblings that were born at one birth.

tags.name: Urban Fantasy
tags.description: Set in a world similar to the real world, but with the existence of magic or other supernatural elements.

tags.name: Revenge
tags.description: Prominently features a character who aims to exact punishment in a resentful or vindictive manner.

tags.name: Kingdom Management
tags.description: Characters in these series take on the responsibility of running a town or kingdom, whether they take control of an existing one, or build their own from the ground up.

tags.name: Age Regression
tags.description: Prominently features a character who was returned to a younger state.

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

tags.name: Swordplay
tags.description: Prominently features the use of swords in combat.

tags.name: Full Color
tags.description: Manga that were initially published in full color.

tags.name: War
tags.description: Partly or completely set during wartime.

tags.name: Royal Affairs
tags.description: Features nobility, alliances, arranged marriage, succession disputes, religious orders and other elements of royal politics.

tags.name: Magic
tags.description: Prominently features magical elements or the use of magic.

tags.name: Long Strip
tags.description: Manga originally published in a vertical, long-strip format, designed for viewing on smartphones. Also known as webtoons.
